---
title: "Call of Cthulhu"
toc: true
---

[Download campaign PDF](../../assets/coc/campaign.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

---

## About this campaign

<!-- Replace with your own campaign description -->

*[Write an introduction to your Call of Cthulhu campaign — setting, era, tone, and what
makes it distinctive.]*

## Background & lore

*[Campaign background: the Mythos threat, key NPCs, the investigators' world.]*

## Sessions

*[Optional: session reports, a play log, or handouts for players.]*
